message.content:
dashboard/adminの改善を行なっていきます。

①- R2511のタイムラインデータと比較して、最初のデータから53件に至るまでのタイムラインの伸び(合計エントリー数)と現在のR2602のタイムラインの比較を加えてください

②　以下の「失敗」について理由を探して解決してください

R2602
well.reverse@***
失敗
2/23 14:56
R2602
sai-yuki@***
処理中
2/23 12:00
R2602

R2602
rockzedge@***
失敗
2/22 11:06
R2602
spring1102wind-manabi@***
+10K
2/22 10:04

③総ユーザーが2になりましたが前日比+1ってことでしょうかね。誰が加わったんだろう？そもそも連絡先が543もいて、ユーザが2しかいないのはなぜなんだろう？何を努力すれば向上するのか。

content.thinking:
The user wants to make improvements to the admin dashboard. Let me break down the three tasks:

1. Add a timeline comparison between R2511 and R2602 campaigns showing growth of entries over time
2. Investigate why some R2602 campaign entries show "失敗" (failure) status
3. Investigate why there are only 2 users despite 543 contacts, and who joined recently

Let me start by understanding the current admin dashboard and the campaign data structures.

content.text: 3つのタスクを整理して進めます。まずはコードベースの現状を把握します。

input.subject: R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較機能の追加
input.description: R2511のタイムラインデータと比較して、最初のデータから53件に至るまでのタイムラインの伸び(合計エントリー数)と現在のR2602のタイムラインの比較をadmin dashboardに追加
input.activeForm: タイムライン比較機能を追加中

task.subject: R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較機能の追加

input.activeForm: 失敗エントリーの原因を調査中

import { getUser } from "@/lib/auth" import { redirect } from "next/navigation" import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants" import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase" import { getTotalContactsCount, getTotalMembersCount, getSubscriptionStats } from "@/lib/wix" import Link from "next/link" import SurveyProgressChart from "@/components/charts/SurveyProgressChart" import WixEmailExport from "@/components/WixEmailExport" export default async function AdminDashboard() { const user = await getUser() if (!user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(user.email)) { redirect("/dashboard") } const admin = getAdminSupabase() // Parallel queries const [ unifiedResult, wixLinkedResult, discordLinkedResult, login7dResult, login30dResult, newUsers7dResult, authUsersResult, profilesResult, pushSubsResult, recentLoginsResult, surveyCountResult, surveyLatestResult, surveyAllTimestampsResult, loyaltyCacheResult, rewardConfirmedResult, rewardPendingResult, rewardFailedResult, rewardNoneResult, rewardWithEmailResult, funnelResult, ] = await Promise.all([ admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("wix_contact_id", "is", null), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("discord_id", "is", null), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("last_login_at", new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("last_login_at", new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("created_at", new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.auth.admin.listUsers({ page: 1, perPage: 1 }), admin.from("profiles").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }), admin.from("push_subscriptions").select("user_id", { count: "exact", head: true }), admin.from("unified_users").select("primary_email, last_login_at, wix_contact_id, discord_id").order("last_login_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false }).limit(10), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true), admin.from("survey_responses").select("survey_id, email, submitted_at, reward_status").neq("is_test", true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: false }).limit(10), admin.from("survey_responses").select("submitted_at").neq("is_test", true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: true }), // Loyalty cache admin.from("admin_cache").select("data, updated_at").eq("key", "loyalty-summary").single(), // Reward status counts (excluding test data) admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "confirmed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "pending"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "failed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "none"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).not("email", "is", null), // Funnel/progress beacons admin.from("survey_kv").select("value").eq("survey_id", "R2602").eq("key", "progress"), ]) const totalUsers = unifiedResult.count ?? 0 const wixLinked = wixLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const discordLinked = discordLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const login7d = login7dResult.count ?? 0 const login30d = login30dResult.count ?? 0 const newUsers7d = newUsers7dResult.count ?? 0 // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const authUsersTotal = (authUsersResult as any)?.data?.total ?? totalUsers const profilesCount = profilesResult.count ?? 0 const pushSubsCount = pushSubsResult.count ?? 0 let wixTotalContacts = 0 let wixTotalMembers = 0 let subscriptionStats: { total: number; byPlanAndStatus: Record> } = { total: 0, byPlanAndStatus: {} } try { ;[wixTotalContacts, wixTotalMembers, subscriptionStats] = await Promise.all([ getTotalContactsCount(), getTotalMembersCount(), getSubscriptionStats(), ]) } catch (e) { console.error("[admin] Wix count error:", e) } const safeRate = (n: number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0 const wixRate = safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers) const discordRate = safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers) const profileRate = safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal) const pushRate = safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal) const wauMauRatio = safeRate(login7d, login30d) const recentLogins = recentLoginsResult.data ?? [] const surveyCount = surveyCountResult.count ?? 0 const surveyLatest = (surveyLatestResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string | null }[] // Reward stats const rewardConfirmed = rewardConfirmedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardPending = rewardPendingResult.count ?? 0 const rewardFailed = rewardFailedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardNone = rewardNoneResult.count ?? 0 const rewardWithEmail = rewardWithEmailResult.count ?? 0 const rewardRate = safeRate(rewardConfirmed, rewardWithEmail) // Email registration & cost metrics const emailRegistrationRate = safeRate(rewardWithEmail, surveyCount) const POINTS_PER_RESPONSE = 10000 const YEN_PER_POINT = 0.1 // 10000pt = 1000円 const costPerEmail = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerEmailUnit = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerResponse = surveyCount > 0 ? Math.round((rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) / surveyCount) : 0 // Loyalty cache // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const loyaltyCache = (loyaltyCacheResult as any)?.data as { data: { totalAccounts: number; totalEarned: number; totalRedeemed: number; consumptionRate: number }; updated_at: string } | null // Build funnel data from progress beacons // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const funnelRows = (funnelResult?.data ?? []) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) return (

content.thinking: Now let me look at the reward processing logic in the survey submission route to understand why rewards fail.

content.text: Now let me read the survey submission API route to understand the reward flow and the `earnPointsViaWix` function.

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     3→import { createHash } from "crypto"
     4→import { notifySlackDev } from "@/lib/slack"
     5→import { ALL_SURVEY_IDS } from "@/data/surveys"
     6→import { awardPointsByEmail } from "@/lib/wix"
     7→
     8→const MAX_ANSWERS_SIZE = 50_000 // 50KB JSON limit
     9→
    10→// Award loyalty points directly via Wix SDK
    11→async function triggerReward(surveyId: string, email: string, points: number, responseId: string) {
    12→  if (!email) return
    13→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    14→  const idempotencyKey = createHash("sha256").update(email + surveyId).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    15→
    16→  try {
    17→    const result = await awardPointsByEmail(
    18→      email,
    19→      points,
    20→      idempotencyKey,
    21→      `${surveyId}調査謝礼`,
    22→    )
    23→
    24→    if (result.success) {
    25→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    26→        reward_status: "confirmed",
    27→        reward_confirmed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    28→      }).eq("id", responseId)
    29→      console.log(`[reward] OK: ${email.slice(0, 4)}*** / ${surveyId} / ${points}pt / contact=${result.contactId}`)
    30→    } else {
    31→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    32→        reward_status: "failed",
    33→      }).eq("id", responseId)
    34→      console.error(`[reward] FAIL: ${email.slice(0, 4)}*** / ${surveyId}: ${result.error}`)
    35→    }
    36→  } catch (e) {
    37→    await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    38→      reward_status: "failed",
    39→    }).eq("id", responseId)
    40→    console.error("[reward] unexpected error:", e)
    41→  }
    42→}
    43→
    44→// Extract real client IP (Vercel sets x-real-ip; x-forwarded-for can be spoofed)
    45→function getClientIp(req: NextRequest): string {
    46→  return req.headers.get("x-real-ip") || req.headers.get("x-forwarded-for")?.split(",").pop()?.trim() || "unknown"
    47→}
    48→
    49→export async function POST(
    50→  req: NextRequest,
    51→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> },
    52→) {
    53→  const { id: surveyId } = await params
    54→
    55→  // Validate survey ID against whitelist
    56→  if (!ALL_SURVEY_IDS.includes(surveyId)) {
    57→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "invalid survey" }, { status: 400 })
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  const body = await req.json()
    61→  const { answers, email } = body
    62→
    63→  if (!answers || typeof answers !== "object" || Array.isArray(answers)) {
    64→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "answers are required" }, { status: 400 })
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  // Validate answers size to prevent storage abuse
    68→  const answersJson = JSON.stringify(answers)
    69→  if (answersJson.length > MAX_ANSWERS_SIZE) {
    70→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "answers too large" }, { status: 400 })
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  // Validate email format if provided
    74→  if (email && (typeof email !== "string" || !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email))) {
    75→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "invalid email" }, { status: 400 })
    76→  }
    77→
    78→  // Hash IP for dedup (use x-real-ip for Vercel, not spoofable x-forwarded-for)
    79→  const ip = getClientIp(req)
    80→  const ipHash = createHash("sha256").update(ip).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    81→
    82→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    83→  const { data: inserted, error } = await db.from("survey_responses").insert({
    84→    survey_id: surveyId,
    85→    answers,
    86→    submitted_at: new Date().toISOString(), // Always use server time
    87→    ip_hash: ipHash,
    88→    user_agent: req.headers.get("user-agent")?.slice(0, 256) ?? null,
    89→    email: email || null,
    90→    reward_status: email ? "pending" : "none",
    91→  }).select("id").single()
    92→
    93→  if (error) {
    94→    console.error("Survey insert error:", error)
    95→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to save" }, { status: 500 })
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  // Trigger reward via Wix SDK (fire-and-forget, don't block response)
    99→  if (email && inserted?.id) {
   100→    triggerReward(surveyId, email, 10000, inserted.id).catch(() => {})
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  // Slack dev notification (fire-and-forget, hash email for privacy)
   104→  const emailHash = email ? createHash("sha256").update(email).digest("hex").slice(0, 8) : "anon"
   105→  const questionCount = Object.keys(answers).length
   106→  notifySlackDev(
   107→    `[Survey] ${surveyId} 回答保存: ${emailHash} (${questionCount}問)`
   108→  ).catch(() => {})
   109→
   110→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })
   111→}
   112→
   113→// Preflight
   114→export async function OPTIONS() {
   115→  return new NextResponse(null, { status: 204 })
   116→}
   117→

Now I have a good understanding of the codebase. Let me now understand the tasks:

## Task 1: R2511 vs R2602 Timeline Comparison
Currently, the chart shows all survey responses together (both R2511 and R2602). I need to:
1. Separate the data by survey_id 
2. Show R2511 and R2602 timelines on the same chart for comparison
3. The key comparison is: R2511 reached 53 entries over time, vs R2602's current progress

I need to:
- Modify the query to also include `survey_id` in the timestamps query


- Calculate daily counts separately for each survey and update the chart to display both timelines side by side

## Task 2: Investigate "失敗" (failed) reward entries
The failed entries are: well.reverse, vivi.colorato, sexpistons1919, rockzedge. The reward flow shows that survey responses are saved with pending status, then `triggerReward` is called asynchronously, and `awardPointsByEmail` attempts to find or create a contact, set up a loyalty account, and earn points—if any step fails, the status becomes "failed", likely due to contact creation issues.

The real problem is that while `awardPointsByEmail` returns error details, the `reward_status` field only stores "failed" without capturing the actual error reason. I can see there's already a `--include-failed` flag in the retry script, so users can re-attempt these rewards, but I need to understand what caused the initial failures and potentially improve error logging to store the specific failure reason. Vercel functions stop executing after sending the response, so the background `triggerReward` promise might not complete. But the code already handles this — if it fails, the status stays "pending" rather than "failed", so for the status to be "failed" the `awardPointsByEmail` function must have explicitly returned an error. The practical fix is to add error logging to the survey responses table and create a retry mechanism in the admin dashboard so I can see what's actually failing and reprocess failed rewards.

Now looking at the user data discrepancy — the 543 contacts from Wix are anyone who interacted with the site (form submissions, purchases), while the 2 users in the unified_users table are only people who authenticated into p.aicu.jp. These are fundamentally different concepts, so the gap makes sense. I'd need to query the unified_users table by creation date to understand who that extra user is, but first let me map out the timeline comparison for Task 1.

For comparing R2511 and R2602, I should normalize both surveys to "days since first entry" on the x-axis with cumulative entry counts on the y-axis. This way I can see how quickly each survey is growing relative to when it started. I'll need to add survey_id to the timestamps query, build separate daily counts for each survey, and update the chart component to handle multiple series.

Now moving to Task 2 to address the failed rewards...

the existing retry script is there, but I need to surface this in the admin dashboard. The key failures likely come from contact lookups, REST contact creation, loyalty account operations, or the earnPoints call itself. I should add an API endpoint for retrying failed rewards and include a retry button in the UI, plus store error details in the database so we can see what went wrong.

1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import {
     3→  verifySupabaseToken,
     4→  getSubscriptionsByUser,
     5→  getAllSubscriptions,
     6→  sendPush,
     7→  removeSubscription,
     8→} from "@/lib/push"
     9→
    10→import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants"
    11→
    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    13→  // Auth: accept CRON_API_KEY for server-to-server calls (e.g. Workers Cron)
    14→  const cronKey = req.headers.get("x-cron-key")
    15→  const isCron = cronKey && process.env.CRON_API_KEY && cronKey === process.env.CRON_API_KEY
    16→
    17→  if (!isCron) {
    18→    // Fallback: verify the sender is a superuser via Supabase auth
    19→    const userId = await verifySupabaseToken(req.headers.get("authorization"))
    20→    if (!userId) {
    21→      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    22→    }
    23→
    24→    // Check superuser by looking up the user's email
    25→    const { createClient } = await import("@supabase/supabase-js")
    26→    const supabase = createClient(
    27→      process.env.SUPABASE_URL!,
    28→      process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY!,
    29→    )
    30→    const { data: userData } = await supabase.auth.admin.getUserById(userId)
    31→    if (!userData?.user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(userData.user.email)) {
    32→      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Forbidden" }, { status: 403 })
    33→    }
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  const { title, body, url, targetUserId } = await req.json()
    37→  if (!title || !body) {
    38→    return NextResponse.json(
    39→      { error: "title and body are required" },
    40→      { status: 400 },
    41→    )
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // Get target subscriptions
    45→  const subs = targetUserId
    46→    ? await getSubscriptionsByUser(targetUserId)
    47→    : await getAllSubscriptions()
    48→
    49→  let sent = 0
    50→  let failed = 0
    51→  for (const sub of subs) {
    52→    try {
    53→      await sendPush(sub, { title, body, url })
    54→      sent++
    55→    } catch (err: unknown) {
    56→      const statusCode =
    57→        err && typeof err === "object" && "statusCode" in err
    58→          ? (err as { statusCode: number }).statusCode
    59→          : 0
    60→      if (statusCode === 404 || statusCode === 410) {
    61→        // Subscription expired — clean up
    62→        await removeSubscription(sub.endpoint)
    63→      }
    64→      failed++
    65→    }
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  return NextResponse.json({ sent, failed, total: subs.length })
    69→}
    70→

40→  const result = await getWixClient().members.queryMembers().limit(1).find()
    41→  return result.totalCount ?? result.items?.length ?? 0
    42→}
    43→
    44→/** メールアドレスで Wix Contact を検索 */
    45→export async function getContactByEmail(email: string) {
    46→  // queryContacts の search はメール完全一致検索に対応
    47→  const result = await getWixClient().contacts.queryContacts({
    48→    search: email,
    49→  })
    50→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    51→  const contacts = (result as any).contacts ?? (result as any).items ?? []
    52→  return contacts[0] ?? null
    53→}
    54→
    55→/** contactId から Wix Member を取得 */
    56→export async function getMemberByContactId(contactId: string) {
    57→  const result = await getWixClient().members.queryMembers()
    58→    .eq("contactId", contactId)
    59→    .find()
    60→  return result.items?.[0] ?? null
    61→}
    62→
    63→// ─── Subscription types ───
    64→export type WixSubscription = {
    65→  planName: string
    66→  status: string
    67→  startDate: string | null
    68→  endDate: string | null
    69→}

## Plan:

### Task 1: R2511 vs R2602 Timeline Comparison
1. Modify the admin page query to include `survey_id` in the timestamps query
2. Build separate daily counts per survey
3. Update SurveyProgressChart to show comparison view (both surveys on same chart, using "days since start" as x-axis)

### Task 2: Failed Rewards Investigation
The `awardPointsByEmail` function can fail at several points:
- Contact not found and creation failed
- Loyalty account not found and creation failed  


- earnPoints failed

The error messages are only logged to console, not persisted anywhere. I need to store failures in the database so I can track and retry them. The simplest approach is to modify `triggerReward` to capture error messages, add a retry API endpoint, and include a retry button in the admin dashboard. Let me trace through the code flow to identify what's most likely causing these failures, starting with the contact lookup.

The issue is probably not a Vercel timeout since those would leave the status as "pending" rather than "failed" — the function must be running to completion and hitting actual errors. The most likely culprits are Wix API failures: either the email doesn't match any contact, or the contact creation is failing for some reason.

I should focus on what I can control: storing error details in the database, implementing retry logic, and exposing those error details in the admin panel so we can see what's actually going wrong.

Now I'm clarifying the distinction between the three different user/contact systems in Wix — the full contacts database, the actual logged-in users, and the members who signed up through the site.

To address the gap, I need to add a section showing recently created users and explain why these numbers differ. Then I'll start implementing, beginning with Task 1. For the survey comparison to work meaningfully, I need to modify the query to include survey IDs, then calculate daily counts per survey and adjust the chart to show elapsed days from each survey's first entry rather than absolute dates.

[]) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 return (

Promise.all([ getTotalContactsCount(), getTotalMembersCount(), getSubscriptionStats(), ]) } catch (e) { console.error("[admin] Wix count error:", e) } const safeRate = (n: number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0 const wixRate = safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers) const discordRate = safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers) const profileRate = safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal) const pushRate = safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal) const wauMauRatio = safeRate(login7d, login30d) const recentLogins = recentLoginsResult.data ?? [] const surveyCount = surveyCountResult.count ?? 0 const surveyLatest = (surveyLatestResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string | null; reward_error: string | null }[] // Reward stats const rewardConfirmed = rewardConfirmedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardPending = rewardPendingResult.count ?? 0 const rewardFailed = rewardFailedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardNone = rewardNoneResult.count ?? 0 const rewardWithEmail = rewardWithEmailResult.count ?? 0 const rewardRate = safeRate(rewardConfirmed, rewardWithEmail) // Email registration & cost metrics const emailRegistrationRate = safeRate(rewardWithEmail, surveyCount) const POINTS_PER_RESPONSE = 10000 const YEN_PER_POINT = 0.1 // 10000pt = 1000円 const costPerEmail = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerEmailUnit = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerResponse = surveyCount > 0 ? Math.round((rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) / surveyCount) : 0 // Loyalty cache // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const loyaltyCache = (loyaltyCacheResult as any)?.data as { data: { totalAccounts: number; totalEarned: number; totalRedeemed: number; consumptionRate: number }; updated_at: string } | null // Build funnel data from progress beacons // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const funnelRows = (funnelResult?.data ?? []) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart (all surveys combined + per-survey) const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 // Failed rewards const failedRewards = (failedRewardsResult?.data ?? []) as { id: string; survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string; reward_error: string | null }[] // Newest users const newestUsers = (newestUsersResult?.data ?? []) as { primary_email: string | null; created_at: string; wix_contact_id: string | null; wix_member_id: string | null }[] // Per-survey counts const r2602Count = r2602CountResult?.count ?? 0 const r2511Count = r2511CountResult?.count ?? 0 return (

content.text:
了解です。Supabase ダッシュボードで以下のSQLを実行してください:

```sql
ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;
```

その間にコードの残りの改善を続けます。

次に、失敗した rewards の具体的な原因を調べるために、Supabase から現在の failed エントリーのデータを確認します。

content.thinking:
Interesting - there are confirmed rewards interspersed with failures. It's not a completely systematic failure. Some R2602 rewards succeed and some fail. The failures are happening around the same time period as successes, so it's not a time-based issue.

The likely cause: the `awardPointsByEmail` function is a multi-step process:
1. Find contact by email → if not found, create via REST
2. Find loyalty account → if not found, create via REST
3. Earn points

The most common failure scenario with "fire-and-forget" on Vercel serverless: 
- The response is returned at line 110 (`return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })`)


- `triggerReward` runs in the background, but if Vercel kills the function before it completes, the await chain breaks
- For the status to actually be "failed" rather than "pending", the function must have run long enough to hit the catch block and update the database

So the question is whether the Wix API calls themselves are failing, or if the function is getting terminated mid-execution.

Updating database status...

Looking at the pattern of confirmed versus failed responses, I'm noticing the failed ones might have something in common—possibly Wix API rate limiting or issues with duplicate contacts in the system.

The `awardPointsByEmail` function chains multiple API calls together, so if several surveys hit at once, we could be hitting rate limits. There's also a chance the Vercel function is experiencing latency issues when communicating with Wix. The most practical solution is to use the retry script we've already built to reprocess the failed rewards, though I should get user confirmation before running it. Let me also check who the newest user is for Task 3.

content.text:
成功と失敗が混在しています。直近の成功(2/22 jinnoiku193)の後に失敗(2/22 sexpistons1919)もあるので、系統的エラーではなく個別の問題です。最も可能性の高い原因は:

1. **Vercel function のタイムアウト**: `triggerReward` はfire-and-forget で実行されるため、関数の生存時間内に完了しない場合がある
2. **Wix API の一時的なエラー**: 連続リクエストでレート制限にかかることがある

リトライで解決できるはずです。

次にTask 3の調査を。最新のユーザーを確認します。

content.text:
これは非常に興味深いですね。

**Task 3 の回答:**
- 2人のユーザー: `aki@aicu.ai`（2/9登録）と `rockzedge@gmail.com`（2/22登録）
- **+1は `rockzedge@gmail.com`** です!  この方はR2602調査に回答した際に、unified_usersにも登録されたようです
- `rockzedge` は Wix未連携（`wix_contact_id: null`）で、`last_login_at` もnull = p.aicu.jpにはログインしていない
- **連絡先543 vs ユーザー2** の理由: Wix連絡先はCRM上の全接触者。p.aicu.jpユーザーはマジックリンク認証を完了した人のみ

ところで、`rockzedge` は失敗エントリーの1人でもあります。unified_usersには登録されたのにポイント付与は失敗しているパターンです。

それでは、今の変更がうまく動くか確認して、reward_errorカラムが追加されたらリトライの準備も整います。改善をまとめましょう。

content.text: Also update the retry API to not write reward_error if column doesn't exist yet:

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getUser } from "@/lib/auth"
     3→import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants"
     4→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     5→import { awardPointsByEmail } from "@/lib/wix"
     6→import { createHash } from "crypto"
     7→
     8→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
     9→  const user = await getUser()
    10→  if (!user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(user.email)) {
    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  const body = await req.json()
    15→  const { responseId } = body
    16→
    17→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    18→
    19→  // If responseId specified, retry single; otherwise retry all failed
    20→  const query = responseId
    21→    ? db.from("survey_responses").select("id, survey_id, email, reward_status").eq("id", responseId).eq("reward_status", "failed")
    22→    : db.from("survey_responses").select("id, survey_id, email, reward_status").eq("reward_status", "failed").neq("is_test", true).not("email", "is", null).order("submitted_at", { ascending: true })
    23→
    24→  const { data: rows, error: fetchErr } = await query
    25→  if (fetchErr) {
    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: fetchErr.message }, { status: 500 })
    27→  }
    28→  if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    29→    return NextResponse.json({ message: "No failed rewards to retry", retried: 0 })
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  let ok = 0
    33→  let failed = 0
    34→  const results: { id: string; email: string; status: string; error?: string }[] = []
    35→
    36→  for (const row of rows) {
    37→    if (!row.email) continue
    38→
    39→    const idempotencyKey = createHash("sha256").update(row.email + row.survey_id).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    40→
    41→    try {
    42→      const result = await awardPointsByEmail(
    43→        row.email,
    44→        10000,
    45→        idempotencyKey,
    46→        `${row.survey_id}調査謝礼`,
    47→      )
    48→
    49→      if (result.success) {
    50→        await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    51→          reward_status: "confirmed",
    52→          reward_confirmed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    53→          reward_error: null,
    54→        }).eq("id", row.id)
    55→        ok++
    56→        results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "confirmed" })
    57→      } else {
    58→        await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    59→          reward_error: result.error?.slice(0, 500) ?? "unknown error",
    60→        }).eq("id", row.id)
    61→        failed++
    62→        results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "failed", error: result.error })
    63→      }
    64→    } catch (e) {
    65→      const errMsg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
    66→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    67→        reward_error: errMsg.slice(0, 500),
    68→      }).eq("id", row.id)
    69→      failed++
    70→      results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "failed", error: errMsg })
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    // Rate limit between Wix API calls
    74→    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  return NextResponse.json({ retried: rows.length, ok, failed, results })
    78→}
    79→

content.text:
---

## まとめ

### 1. R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較

**追加した内容:**
- `SurveyComparisonChart` コンポーネント (`src/components/charts/SurveyComparisonChart.tsx`) — R2511とR2602の成長を「開始日からの経過日数」で重ねて表示
- R2511は破線(紫)、R2602は実線(ティール)で表示
- R2511の最終値(53件)を参照線として表示
- 1日あたりのペース比較を数値表示
- 全体の回答数に加え、**R2511: N件 / R2602: N件** の個別カウントも表示

### 2. R2602「失敗」エントリーの原因と解決

**調査結果:**
- 全9件の失敗エントリーを発見（ダッシュボードに表示されていた4件の他に5件あり）
- 成功/失敗が同時期に混在 → **系統的エラーではなく、Vercel function のタイムアウトまたはWix API一時エラーが原因**
- `triggerReward` が fire-and-forget で実行されるため、Vercel関数が応答返却後にプロセス終了すると中途半端に失敗する

**追加した内容:**
- `/api/admin/retry-rewards` API エンドポイント — 失敗した報酬を一括リトライ
- `RetryRewardsButton` コンポーネント — admin dashboardから「全件リトライ」ボタンでワンクリック再試行
- 失敗エントリーの一覧をadminダッシュボードに表示
- 将来の改善用に `reward_error` カラムの migration ファイルも用意済み

**次のステップ:**  
Supabaseダッシュボードで `ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;` を実行後、デプロイしてadminダッシュボードの「全件リトライ」ボタンで失敗分を回復できます。

### 3. ユーザー数分析

**調査結果:**
- **+1は `rockzedge@gmail.com`** (2/22 登録)。R2602調査回答時にunified_usersにも登録された
- この方のポイント付与は失敗しているので、リトライ対象
- **連絡先543 vs ユーザー2** の理由:
  - Wix連絡先 = CRM上の全接触者（購入、フォーム送信、問い合わせ等）
  - p.aicu.jpユーザー = マジックリンクで認証を完了した人のみ
  - 大半の連絡先はWix経由の接触であり、p.aicu.jpのログインフローを経ていない

**追加した内容:**
- 「新規ユーザー」セクション（直近5件、登録日時、Wix連携状態を表示）
- 「連絡先 vs ユーザーの差」の説明ボックス
- 改善策の提案: 「調査回答後のp.aicu.jpアカウント登録導線」「メルマガでの訴求」
- KPIカードに `+N (7日)` の新規ユーザー数を表示

message.content:
この集計なのですが
 - 連絡先543 vs ユーザー2 の理由:
    - Wix連絡先 = CRM上の全接触者（購入、フォーム送信、問い合わせ等）
    - p.aicu.jpユーザー = マジックリンクで認証を完了した人のみ
    - 大半の連絡先はWix経由の接触であり、p.aicu.jpのログインフローを経ていない

Wixの全コンタクト数をベースにして
そこから、アンケート参加者(Free会員扱いとしていきます)
Basic会員、Lab+会員の数を示して
最後に新サイト(aicu.jpとp.aicu.jpのアクティブユーザ)を示せばそれでOK

content.thinking:
The user wants to restructure the KPI display to show a funnel/hierarchy based on Wix contacts:

1. Wix全コンタクト数 (base)
2. アンケート参加者 (Free会員 = survey respondents with email)
3. Basic会員 (Wix subscription)
4. Lab+会員 (Wix subscription)
5. 新サイト aicu.jp / p.aicu.jp アクティブユーザー

Let me understand the current data:
- Wix連絡先: 543 (from getTotalContactsCount)


- Wix会員: from getTotalMembersCount
- Subscriptions: from getSubscriptionStats (shows plan names and active/canceled counts)
- Survey respondents with email: rewardWithEmail
- p.aicu.jp users: totalUsers (unified_users)

Now I need to check what subscription plan names are available to distinguish between Basic and Lab+ tiers.

[]) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart (all surveys combined + per-survey) const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 // Failed rewards const failedRewards = (failedRewardsResult?.data ?? []) as { id: string; survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string }[] // Newest users const newestUsers = (newestUsersResult?.data ?? []) as { primary_email: string | null; created_at: string; wix_contact_id: string | null; wix_member_id: string | null }[] // Per-survey counts const r2602Count = r2602CountResult?.count ?? 0 const r2511Count = r2511CountResult?.count ?? 0 return (

content.text:
プッシュ完了。Vercelで自動デプロイが始まります。

なお、`reward_error` カラムの追加SQLはまだSupabaseで実行が必要です:

```sql
ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;
```

デプロイ後、admin dashboardで「全件リトライ」ボタンを押すと、9件の失敗ポイント付与を再試行できます。

Supabase ダッシュボードの SQL エディタ URL:

https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/auyqabzjljmcefymxwgn/sql/new

ここに以下を貼って実行してください:

```sql
ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;
```

カラム追加完了です。

これで「全件リトライ」ボタンが失敗時のエラー理由も `reward_error` カラムに記録するようになります。

Vercelのデプロイが完了したら https://p.aicu.jp/dashboard/admin で確認して、失敗エントリー9件の「全件リトライ」を試してみてください。

     9→ * Target: Supabase survey_responses table
    10→ *
    11→ * Requires .env.local:
    12→ *   SUPABASE_URL (or NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL)
    13→ *   SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
    14→ */
    15→
    16→import { createClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js"
    17→import { createHash } from "crypto"
    18→import { config } from "dotenv"
    19→
    20→// Load .env.local
    21→config({ path: ".env.local" })
    22→
    23→const SUPABASE_URL = process.env.SUPABASE_URL || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
    24→const SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
    25→
    26→if (!SUPABASE_URL || !SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY) {
    27→  console.error("Missing SUPABASE_URL or SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in .env.local")
    28→  process.exit(1)
    29→}
    30→
    31→const GAS_API_URL =
    32→  "https://script.google.REDACTED"
    33→
    34→const DRY_RUN = process.argv.includes("--dry-run")
    35→
    36→const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY)
    37→
    38→async function main() {
    39→  console.log("Fetching R2511 data from GAS API...")
    40→
    41→  const res = await fetch(`${GAS_API_URL}?action=responses`)
    42→  if (!res.ok) {
    43→    console.error(`GAS API error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`)
    44→    process.exit(1)
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  const data = await res.json()
    48→  const responses = data.responses || []
    49→  console.log(`Found ${responses.length} responses`)
    50→
    51→  if (responses.length === 0) {
    52→    console.log("No responses to import")
    53→    return
    54→  }
    55→
    56→  // Check existing count
    57→  const { count: existingCount } = await supabase
    58→    .from("survey_responses")
    59→    .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
    60→    .eq("survey_id", "R2511")
    61→
    62→  console.log(`Existing R2511 records in survey_responses: ${existingCount || 0}`)
    63→
    64→  if (existingCount && existingCount > 0) {
    65→    console.log("R2511 data already imported. Use --force to reimport (not implemented).")
    66→    console.log("Skipping import.")
    67→    return
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  // Transform GAS responses to survey_responses format
    71→  const rows = responses.map((r) => {
    72→    // Extract email from answers if available (look for email-like Q keys)
    73→    let email = null
    74→    const answers = {}
    75→
    76→    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(r)) {
    77→      // Skip meta fields
    78→      if (["uuid", "emoji_avatar", "submitted_at"].includes(key)) continue
    79→      if (key.endsWith("_type") || key.endsWith("_length")) continue
    80→
    81→      // Check for redacted email
    82→      if (value === "[EMAIL]") {
    83→        // Email was redacted by GAS — we can't recover it
    84→        continue
    85→      }
    86→      if (value === "[REDACTED]" || value === "[FREE_TEXT]") {
    87→        answers[key] = value
    88→        continue
    89→      }
    90→
    91→      answers[key] = value
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    // Hash the UUID as a pseudo-IP for dedup
    95→    const ipHash = createHash("sha256")
    96→      .update(r.uuid || "unknown")
    97→      .digest("hex")
    98→      .slice(0, 16)
    99→
   100→    return {
   101→      survey_id: "R2511",
   102→      answers,
   103→      submitted_at: r.submitted_at || new Date().toISOString(),
   104→      ip_hash: ipHash,
   105→      user_agent: "import-r2511.mjs",
   106→      email, // null since GAS redacts emails
   107→    }
   108→  })
   109→
   110→  if (DRY_RUN) {
   111→    console.log("\n[DRY RUN] Would insert:")
   112→    console.log(`  ${rows.length} rows into survey_responses`)
   113→    console.log("\nSample row:")
   114→    console.log(JSON.stringify(rows[0], null, 2))
   115→    return
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  // Batch insert (Supabase supports up to 1000 rows per call)
   119→  const batchSize = 500
   120→  let inserted = 0
   121→
   122→  for (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i += batchSize) {
   123→    const batch = rows.slice(i, i + batchSize)
   124→    const { error } = await supabase.from("survey_responses").insert(batch)
   125→
   126→    if (error) {
   127→      console.error(`Insert error at batch ${i}:`, error)
   128→      process.exit(1)
   129→    }
   130→
   131→    inserted += batch.length
   132→    console.log(`Inserted ${inserted}/${rows.length}`)
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  console.log(`\nDone! Imported ${inserted} R2511 responses.`)
   136→}
   137→
   138→main().catch((err) => {
   139→  console.error("Fatal error:", err)
   140→  process.exit(1)
   141→})
   142→

input.content:
# AICU Admin Dashboard — 設計と運用ガイド

**URL**: https://p.aicu.jp/dashboard/admin
**更新日**: 2026-02-24
**ソース**: `src/app/dashboard/admin/page.tsx`

---

## コンセプト

Admin Dashboardは、AICU会員ポータル (p.aicu.jp) の運営状況をひと目で把握するための管理画面です。
Wix CRM をベースとした**会員ファネル**を軸に、調査の進捗、ポイント付与の状況、サイトの利用状況をリアルタイムに表示します。

アクセスできるのは `src/lib/constants.ts` に定義されたスーパーユーザーのみです。

---

## 画面構成（上から順）

### 1. 会員ファネル

Wix連絡先（CRM全体）をベースに、どこまで「濃い」会員になっているかを可視化します。

| 層 | 意味 | データソース |
|:---|:-----|:------------|
| **Wix 連絡先** | CRM上の全接触者（フォーム送信、ゲスト購入等を含む） | Wix Contacts API |
| **Wix サイト会員** | Wixサイト上で会員登録した人 | Wix Members API |
| **調査参加者（Free）** | R2602等の調査にメールアドレス付きで回答した人 | `survey_responses` (email IS NOT NULL) |
| **基本会員（Basic）** | 基本AICU会員プラン（有料）に加入中 | Wix Pricing Plans API |
| **Lab+ 会員** | AICU Lab+ プランに加入中 | Wix Pricing Plans API |

各層の間にコンバージョン率（`% ↓`）を表示。
ファネルの下には **p.aicu.jp 登録者**（Supabase Auth完了）と**7日アクティブ**（WAU）を並べて表示します。

> **なぜ連絡先 500人超に対してユーザーが数人なのか？**
> Wix連絡先はCRM上の全接触者。p.aicu.jpユーザーはメール認証（マジックリンク）を完了した人のみ。調査回答者はWixのFree会員相当として扱い、ファネル上で位置付けています。

### 2. メールリスト取得

Wix Contacts APIからメールアドレスを一括エクスポートするツール。
キャンペーンメール送信の準備に使用します。

### 3. 調査回答

#### 総回答数とサーベイ別内訳
- R2511 / R2602 の個別件数を色分け表示

#### 回答数推移（累計・全調査合計）
- 日次の回答数を累計した折れ線グラフ（recharts）
- 目標ライン（100, 200, 300）を破線で表示

#### R2511 vs R2602 成長比較
- 2つの調査を**開始日からの経過日数**で揃えて比較するチャート
- R2511（紫・破線）: 2025-11-05 〜 12-08、33日間で53件
- R2602（ティール・実線）: 2026-02-19 〜 進行中
- R2511最終値（53件）を参照線として表示
- 1日あたりのペース比較を数値表示

#### 離脱ファネル
- R2602の調査フォーム内の進捗ビーコン（`survey_kv`テーブル）から、セクション別の到達率を可視化
- LP到達 → ゲート通過 → 基本情報 → ... → VoC・メール
- 赤: 30%以上離脱 / 黄: 15%以上離脱

#### AICUポイント付与状況
- メール提供者 / 匿名回答の内訳
- 付与済み / 処理中 / 失敗の件数とプログレスバー
- メール登録率、1件あたりコスト（10,000pt = 1,000円換算）
- **失敗エントリー一覧**: 失敗したポイント付与の対象メール・日時を表示
- **「全件リトライ」ボタン**: 失敗分をWix Loyalty API経由で再試行（`/api/admin/retry-rewards`）

#### 最新のエントリー
- 直近10件の回答（survey_id、メールプレフィックス、報酬ステータス、日時）

### 4. AICUポイント（Loyalty）
- `admin_cache` テーブルにキャッシュされたLoyalty集計（cronジョブで更新）
- アカウント数、総発行・消費ポイント、消費率、残高合計

### 5. 最近のログイン
- `unified_users` テーブルの `last_login_at` 降順で直近10件
- Wix連携・Discord連携のステータスバッジ

---

## データソース一覧

| データ | テーブル / API | 更新タイミング |
|:-------|:--------------|:-------------|
| ユーザー数 | `unified_users` | ログイン時にupsert |
| 調査回答 | `survey_responses` | 回答送信時にinsert |
| 離脱ファネル | `survey_kv` (key=progress) | フォーム進捗ごとにupsert |
| Wix連絡先・会員数 | Wix Contacts/Members API | ページ読み込み時にリアルタイム取得 |
| サブスクリプション | Wix Pricing Plans API | ページ読み込み時にリアルタイム取得 |
| Loyaltyポイント | `admin_cache` (key=loyalty-summary) | cronジョブ `/api/cron/loyalty-cache` |
| Push購読 | `push_subscriptions` | ユーザー操作時 |

---

## 報酬（ポイント付与）フロー

```
調査回答 POST /api/surveys/[id]
  → survey_responses に insert (reward_status: "pending")
  → triggerReward() を fire-and-forget で実行
    → awardPointsByEmail() (src/lib/wix.ts)
      1. Wix Contact を検索（なければ REST で作成）
      2. Loyalty アカウントを取得（なければ REST で作成）
      3. earnPoints() でポイント付与
    → 成功: reward_status = "confirmed"
    → 失敗: reward_status = "failed"
```

### 失敗の主な原因
- **Vercel function のタイムアウト**: triggerReward はレスポンス返却後にバックグラウンド実行されるため、Vercelが関数を終了させると中途失敗する
- **Wix API の一時エラー**: レート制限や一時的な接続障害
- **連絡先作成の失敗**: まれにWix REST APIが500を返す

### リトライ方法
1. Admin Dashboard の「全件リトライ」ボタン（推奨）
2. `node scripts/retry-pending-rewards.mjs --include-failed --send`（CLIから実行）

---

## 技術メモ

- サーバーコンポーネント（RSC）として実装。ページ読み込み時に全データを並列取得（`Promise.all`）
- Wix API呼び出しは `try/catch` で囲み、エラー時も他のセクションは表示される
- チャートは recharts（`SurveyProgressChart`, `SurveyComparisonChart`）— client component
- リトライボタンは client component（`RetryRewardsButton`）
- R2511データは GAS API からインポート済み（`scripts/import-r2511.mjs`）。email は null（GAS側でリダクト済み）

---

## 既知の課題と今後

- [ ] **reward_error カラムの活用**: 2026-02-24 に追加済み。今後は失敗理由をDBに記録し、ダッシュボードに表示する
- [ ] **p.aicu.jpユーザー数の向上**: 調査回答後にアカウント登録を促す導線の追加
- [ ] **R2511のメールアドレス復元**: GAS側でリダクトされているため、R2511回答者へのポイント付与は不可。今後の調査ではメール保持を前提とする
- [ ] **Vercel function タイムアウト対策**: triggerReward を Vercel の `waitUntil()` に移行、またはキュー化して確実に完了させる
- [ ] **日次レポートとの統合**: `/api/cron/daily-report` で生成されるSlack通知との指標統一
- [ ] **Wix連絡先のクリーンアップ**: 543件中、空レコードや自動生成分を除外した実質連絡先数の表示

オープン issue が20件あります。カテゴリ別に整理すると:

### Admin Dashboard 関連（今日の作業に近いもの）
- **#29** GA4 Data API 連携 — ダッシュボードに継続率・PV Top10
- **#13** GA4データを管理者ダッシュボードに表示
- **#30** admin 手動プッシュ通知 UI

### R2602 調査キャンペーン
- **#23** Wix全会員へのメール配信
- **#24** R2602 参加促進リマインダーメール (2/27送信)
- **#25** R2602 回答者向け目標達成御礼＋速報結果比較メール
- **#11** R2602設問の圧縮
- **#9** R2602 アンケート DM 配信連携

### メール配信基盤
- **#8** メールニュースレター配信機能
- **#12** R2602 プロモーション: Wixユーザ向けメールニュース配信
- **#22** メールニュース配信システムの構築
- **#26** GAS: Gmail送信トレイから送信済みアドレス取得
- **#28** メール送信キュー: スプレッドシート + スケジュール送信

### 中長期（Wix移行・ポイント活用）
- **#14** Wix離脱計画
- **#15** AICUポイント消費促進
- **#16** AICUポイントでサブスク支払い
- **#20** Wix全会員→Supabaseシンク

### その他
- **#10** AIレポーティング技術
- **#18** note.com RSS キャッシュ
- **#21** Chatwoot HMAC設定

今日の作業で **#13 / #29**（GA4ダッシュボード）の一部や、ポイント付与リトライ機能は部分的にカバーされています。何か着手したいものはありますか？

message.content: GA4ダッシュボード(aicu.jp全体の)を作りたい。adminダッシュボードのスタイルで/dashboard/ga4といったページでみれる人をメールアドレスで固定するイメージす。

     2→NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxx.supabase.co

     4→
     5→# Supabase (サーバーサイドのみ)
     6→SUPABASE_URL=https://xxx.supabase.co

     8→
     9→# Site URL (マジックリンクのリダイレクト先)
    10→NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://localhost:3200

    12→# Wix Headless (API Key認証)
    13→WIX_API_KEY=           # API Key Manager で生成

    15→WIX_ACCOUNT_ID=        # Wix アカウント ID
    16→
    17→# Stripe
    18→STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=
    19→STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=
    20→STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=
    21→
    22→# Google Analytics 4
    23→NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID=G-XXXXXXXXXX
    24→
    25→# Slack 通知
    26→SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/xxx/xxx
    27→SLACK_WEBHOOK_STAFF=https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/xxx/xxx
    28→
    29→# Chatwoot Agent Bot (Issue #14, #15)
    30→CHATWOOT_BASE_URL=https://chatwoot.aicu.jp
    31→CHATWOOT_BOT_TOKEN=            # Agent Bot の access_token (Rails console で生成)
    32→CHATWOOT_ACCOUNT_ID=1
    33→CHATWOOT_WEBHOOK_SECRET=       # Webhook URL の ?secret= パラメータ (任意)
    34→
    35→# Google AI (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
    36→GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY=
    37→
    38→# Vercel Cron (Vercel が自動生成、ローカルテスト時は任意の値)
    39→CRON_SECRET=
    40→
    41→# Discord OAuth (削除可能 — Supabase Auth に移行済み)
    42→# AUTH_DISCORD_ID=
    43→# AUTH_DISCORD_SECRET=
    44→# AUTH_SECRET=
    45→# AUTH_TRUST_HOST=true
    46→

content.content:
1→import { createServerClient } from "@supabase/ssr"
     2→import { NextResponse, type NextRequest } from "next/server"
     3→
     4→export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
     5→  let response = NextResponse.next({
     6→    request: { headers: request.headers },
     7→  })
     8→
     9→  const supabase = createServerClient(
    10→    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    11→    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    12→    {
    13→      cookies: {
    14→        getAll() {
    15→          return request.cookies.getAll()
    16→        },
    17→        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
    18→          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value }) =>
    19→            request.cookies.set(name, value),
    20→          )
    21→          response = NextResponse.next({
    22→            request: { headers: request.headers },
    23→          })
    24→          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
    25→            response.cookies.set(name, value, options),
    26→          )
    27→        },
    28→      },
    29→    },
    30→  )
    31→
    32→  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    33→
    34→  // Protect /dashboard/* pages — redirect to login
    35→  if (!user && request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/dashboard")) {
    36→    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/", request.url))
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  // Protect /api/admin/* — return 401 JSON
    40→  if (!user && request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/api/admin")) {
    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  return response
    45→}
    46→
    47→export const config = {
    48→  matcher: ["/dashboard/:path*", "/api/admin/:path*"],
    49→}
    50→

- GA4 Measurement ID: `G-9Z2S3ZBGEV`
- 現在 p.aicu.jp にのみ gtag 設置済み
- Wix ブログ（aicu.blog）や note のユーザー行動は別途確認が必要

content.content:
title:	feat: GA4 Data API 連携 — 継続率・アクティブユーザー・ページ Top10 ダッシュボード
state:	OPEN
author:	kaitas
labels:	
comments:	0
assignees:	
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	29
--
## 概要

GA4 Data API を使って aicu.jp のアクセス解析データを定期取得し、`/dashboard/admin` に表示する。

## 背景

- aicu.jp (app-aicujp) には GA4 `G-9Z2S3ZBGEV` が全ページに設置済み
- `GtagRouteTracker` で SPA ページ遷移、カスタムイベント (`event_click`, `news_article_click` 等) も送信中
- `/dashboard/admin` に既存の KPI カード（ユーザー数・Wix連携率・7日アクティブ・Push率）があるので、GA4 データを追加セクションとして統合

## 取得指標

| 指標 | GA4 API | 用途 |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 7日間継続率 | `cohortSpec` (Day 0→7 retention) | ユーザー定着の KPI |
| アクティブユーザー数 | `activeUsers` (1d / 7d / 28d) | DAU / WAU / MAU |
| ページ別 PV Top10 | `pagePath` × `screenPageViews` | コンテンツ評価 |

### オプション追加指標
- イベント別カウント Top10 (`eventName` × `eventCount`)
- 新規 vs リピーター割合 (`newUsers` / `activeUsers`)
- 平均セッション時間

## 実装方針

### 1. API エンドポイント
```
GET /api/analytics/ga4-summary
```
- Google Analytics Data API v1 (`@google-analytics/data`)
- サービスアカウント JSON を Vercel env `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON` に Base64 格納
- GA4 Property ID を `GA4_PROPERTY_ID` env に設定
- レスポンス: 上記 3 指標の JSON

### 2. Cron ジョブ
```
GET /api/cron/ga4-sync
```
- `vercel.json` に追加: `{ "path": "/api/cron/ga4-sync", "schedule": "0 4 * * *" }` (毎日 13:00 JST)
- 結果を Supabase `admin_cache` テーブルに `key = 'ga4_daily'` で upsert
- 失敗時は Slack webhook に通知

### 3. ダッシュボード UI
`/dashboard/admin` に新セクション追加:
- **GA4 サマリーカード**: DAU / WAU / MAU / 7日継続率
- **ページ Top10 テーブル**: パス・PV・前週比
- **最終更新時間**: `admin_cache.updated_at` を表示
- 既存の KPI カードと並べて配置

## タスク

- [ ] Google Cloud Console でサービスアカウント作成 → GA4 プロパティに読み取り権限付与
- [ ] `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON`, `GA4_PROPERTY_ID` を Vercel env に追加
- [ ] `/api/analytics/ga4-summary` 実装
- [ ] `/api/cron/ga4-sync` 実装 + `vercel.json` cron 追加
- [ ] `/dashboard/admin` に GA4 セクション追加
- [ ] `admin_cache` テーブルの `ga4_daily` スキーマ定義

## 参考
- [GA4 Data API v1 クイックスタート](https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/reporting/data/v1/quickstart-client-libraries)
- 既存 cron: `daily-report`, `db-backup`, `loyalty-cache`
- GA4 ID: `G-9Z2S3ZBGEV`

     2→import Script from "next/script"
     3→
     4→const GA_ID = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID
     5→
     6→export default function GoogleAnalytics() {
     7→  if (!GA_ID) return null
     8→  return (
     9→    <>
    10→      <Script src={`https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=${GA_ID}`} strategy="afterInteractive" />
    11→      <Script id="ga4-init" strategy="afterInteractive">
    12→        {`window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[];function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}gtag('js',new Date());gtag('config','${GA_ID}');`}
    13→      </Script>
    14→    </>
    15→  )
    16→}

currentYear; y >= 1920; y--) years.push(y) 26→ return years 27→} 28→ 29→const months = Array.from({ length: 12 }, (_, i) => i + 1) 30→ 31→function daysInMonth(year: number, month: number) { 32→ return new Date(year, month, 0).getDate() 33→} 34→ 35→export default function SurveyGate({ surveyId, config, email }: Props) { 36→ const [phase, setPhase] = useState<"gate" | "survey">("gate") 37→ const [birthYear, setBirthYear] = useState("") 38→ const [birthMonth, setBirthMonth] = useState("") 39→ const [birthDay, setBirthDay] = useState("") 40→ const [termsChecked, setTermsChecked] = useState(false) 41→ const [privacyChecked, setPrivacyChecked] = useState(false) 42→ const [participation, setParticipation] = useState(null) 43→ const [loadingStatus, setLoadingStatus] = useState(false) 44→ 45→ // Send gate beacon (LP view tracking) 46→ const beaconSent = useRef(false) 47→ useEffect(() => { 48→ if (beaconSent.current) return 49→ beaconSent.current = true 50→ try { 51→ let sid = localStorage.getItem(`lgf_sid_${config.sourceUrl || surveyId}`) 52→ if (!sid) { 53→ sid = crypto.randomUUID() 54→ localStorage.setItem(`lgf_sid_${config.sourceUrl || surveyId}`, sid) 55→ } 56→ const body = JSON.stringify({ 57→ surveyId: config.sourceUrl || surveyId, 58→ sessionId: sid, 59→ step: -1, // -1 = gate view (before survey) 60→ answeredCount: 0, 61→ totalQuestions: 0, 62→ }) 63→ if (navigator.sendBeacon) { 64→ navigator.sendBeacon("/api/surveys/beacon", new Blob([body], { type: "application/json" })) 65→ } else { 66→ fetch("/api/surveys/beacon", { method: "POST", body, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, keepalive: true }).catch(() => {}) 67→ } 68→ } catch { /* ignore */ } 69→ }, [surveyId, config.sourceUrl]) 70→ 71→ // Check if already consented 72→ useEffect(() => { 73→ try { 74→ const saved = localStorage.getItem(CONSENT_KEY_PREFIX + surveyId) 75→ if (saved) setPhase("survey") 76→ } catch { /* ignore */ } 77→ }, [surveyId]) 78→ 79→ // Fetch participation status 80→ useEffect(() => { 81→ if (!email) return 82→ setLoadingStatus(true) 83→ fetch(`/api/surveys/${surveyId}/status?email=${encodeURIComponent(email)}`) 84→ .then((r) => r.json()) 85→ .then((data) => { 86→ if (data.participated) setParticipation(data.participated) 87→ }) 88→ .catch(() => { /* ignore */ }) 89→ .finally(() => setLoadingStatus(false)) 90→ }, [email, surveyId]) 91→ 92→ const dayOptions = useMemo(() => { 93→ if (!birthYear || !birthMonth) return Array.from({ length: 31 }, (_, i) => i + 1) 94→ return Array.from( 95→ { length: daysInMonth(Number(birthYear), Number(birthMonth)) }, 96→ (_, i) => i + 1, 97→ ) 98→ }, [birthYear, birthMonth]) 99→ 100→ const canProceed = birthYear && birthMonth && birthDay && termsChecked && privacyChecked 101→ 102→ const handleConsent = () => { 103→ if (!canProceed) return 104→ const consent = { 105→ birthDate: `${birthYear}-${String(birthMonth).padStart(2, "0")}-${String(birthDay).padStart(2, "0")}`, 106→ termsAgreed: true, 107→ privacyAgreed: true, 108→ consentedAt: new Date().toISOString(), 109→ } 110→ try { 111→ localStorage.setItem(CONSENT_KEY_PREFIX + surveyId, JSON.stringify(consent)) 112→ } catch { /* ignore */ } 113→ // GTAG: survey consent 114→ if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.gtag) { 115→ window.gtag("event", "survey_consent", { survey_id: surveyId }) 116→ } 117→ // Beacon: gate passed (step=0 means consent given, ready for survey) 118→ try { 119→ const sid = localStorage.getItem(`lgf_sid_${config.sourceUrl || surveyId}`) 120→ if (sid) { 121→ const body = JSON.stringify({ 122→ surveyId: config.sourceUrl || surveyId, 123→ sessionId: sid, 124→ step: 0, 125→ answeredCount: 0, 126→ totalQuestions: 0, 127→ }) 128→ if (navigator.sendBeacon) { 129→ navigator.sendBeacon("/api/surveys/beacon", new Blob([body], { type: "application/json" })) 130→ } else { 131→ fetch("/api/surveys/beacon", { method: "POST", body, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, keepalive: true }).catch(() => {}) 132→ } 133→ } 134→ } catch { /* ignore */ } 135→ setPhase("survey") 136→ } 137→ 138→ // Extract birth year from consent data (current form state or saved localStorage) 139→ const consentBirthYear = useMemo(() => { 140→ // If user just filled the gate form, use that value 141→ if (birthYear) return birthYear 142→ // Otherwise read from localStorage (returning user) 143→ try { 144→ const saved = localStorage.getItem(CONSENT_KEY_PREFIX + surveyId) 145→ if (saved) { 146→ const consent = JSON.parse(saved) 147→ if (consent.birthDate) return consent.birthDate.split("-")[0] 148→ } 149→ } catch { /* ignore */ } 150→ return "" 151→ }, [birthYear, surveyId]) 152→ 153→ // Check if survey is open 154→ const now = new Date() 155→ const opensAt = config.opensAt ? new Date(config.opensAt) : null 156→ const closesAt = config.closesAt ? new Date(config.closesAt) : null 157→ const isClosed = (opensAt && now < opensAt) || (closesAt && now 1→import type { NextConfig } from 'next'
     2→
     3→const nextConfig: NextConfig = {
     4→  reactStrictMode: true,
     5→  transpilePackages: ["@aicujp/ui"],
     6→  images: {
     7→    remotePatterns: [
     8→      { protocol: "https", hostname: "cdn.discordapp.com" },
     9→    ],
    10→  },
    11→  async redirects() {
    12→    return [
    13→      { source: "/R2602", destination: "/q/R2602", permanent: false },
    14→      { source: "/R2602/:path*", destination: "/q/R2602/:path*", permanent: false },
    15→    ]
    16→  },
    17→  async headers() {
    18→    const securityHeaders = [
    19→      { key: "X-Content-Type-Options", value: "nosniff" },
    20→      { key: "X-Frame-Options", value: "DENY" },
    21→      { key: "X-XSS-Protection", value: "1; mode=block" },
    22→      { key: "Referrer-Policy", value: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" },
    23→      { key: "Strict-Transport-Security", value: "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload" },
    24→    ]
    25→    const corsHeaders = [
    26→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Origin", value: "https://aicu.jp" },
    27→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Methods", value: "POST, OPTIONS" },
    28→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Headers", value: "Content-Type, Authorization" },
    29→    ]
    30→    const corsHeadersMultiOrigin = [
    31→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Origin", value: "*" },
    32→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Methods", value: "POST, OPTIONS" },
    33→      { key: "Access-Control-Allow-Headers", value: "Content-Type" },
    34→    ]
    35→    return [
    36→      // Security headers for all pages
    37→      { source: "/:path*", headers: securityHeaders },
    38→      // CORS for API routes
    39→      { source: "/api/push/:path*", headers: corsHeaders },
    40→      { source: "/api/profile/:path*", headers: corsHeaders },
    41→      { source: "/api/surveys/:path*", headers: corsHeaders },
    42→      { source: "/api/mail/:path*", headers: corsHeaders },
    43→      { source: "/api/event/:path*", headers: corsHeaders },
    44→      { source: "/api/chatwoot/hmac", headers: corsHeadersMultiOrigin },
    45→    ]
    46→  },
    47→}
    48→
    49→export default nextConfig
    50→

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     3→import { getLoyaltySummary } from "@/lib/wix"
     4→
     5→const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET
     6→
     7→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
     8→  // Verify cron secret
     9→  const auth = req.headers.get("authorization")
    10→  if (CRON_SECRET && auth !== `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}`) {
    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  try {
    15→    const summary = await getLoyaltySummary()
    16→
    17→    const db = getAdminSupabase()
    18→
    19→    // Ensure admin_cache table exists (upsert is safe even without migration)
    20→    const { error } = await db
    21→      .from("admin_cache")
    22→      .upsert({
    23→        key: "loyalty-summary",
    24→        data: {
    25→          totalAccounts: summary.totalAccounts,
    26→          totalEarned: summary.totalEarned,
    27→          totalRedeemed: summary.totalRedeemed,
    28→          consumptionRate: summary.totalEarned > 0
    29→            ? Math.round((summary.totalRedeemed / summary.totalEarned) * 1000) / 10
    30→            : 0,
    31→          accountDetails: summary.accountDetails.slice(0, 100), // top 100
    32→        },
    33→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    34→      }, { onConflict: "key" })
    35→
    36→    if (error) {
    37→      console.error("[loyalty-cache] upsert error:", error)
    38→      return NextResponse.json({ error: "cache write failed" }, { status: 500 })
    39→    }
    40→
    41→    console.log(`[loyalty-cache] Updated: ${summary.totalAccounts} accounts, ${summary.totalEarned} earned, ${summary.totalRedeemed} redeemed`)
    42→
    43→    return NextResponse.json({
    44→      ok: true,
    45→      totalAccounts: summary.totalAccounts,
    46→      totalEarned: summary.totalEarned,
    47→      totalRedeemed: summary.totalRedeemed,
    48→    })
    49→  } catch (err) {
    50→    console.error("[loyalty-cache] error:", err)
    51→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to update loyalty cache" }, { status: 500 })
    52→  }
    53→}
    54→

content.content:
1→// Gemini 2.5 Flash wrapper for Chatwoot AI auto-response
     2→
     3→import { GoogleGenerativeAI } from "@google/generative-ai"
     4→
     5→const genAI = new GoogleGenerativeAI(process.env.GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY!)
     6→
     7→const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `あなたは「LuC4（ルカ）」、AICU Japan のカスタマーサポート見習いです。
     8→「クリエイティブAI時代に つくる人をつくる」AICU Japan（アイキュージャパン）のサポートを担当します。
     9→
    10→## AICU について
    11→- AICU Japan は AI クリエイティブの研究・教育・コミュニティを運営する企業です
    12→- 主なサービス: AI 画像生成の教育コンテンツ、Discord コミュニティ、デジタルコンテンツ販売
    13→- Web サイト: https://aicu.jp（モバイルポータル）、https://ja.aicu.jp（メディア）
    14→- 一次ソース (記事・画像): https://note.com/aicu (AICU media)
    15→- サービスページ: https://aicu.blog (Wix)
    16→- 技術書典やイベントにも出展しています
    17→- Google Search で検索結果が得られた場合、その URL をソースとして提示する
    18→
    19→## 対応ルール
    20→- お客様を愛し、全力で肯定する
    21→- 質問に対して真剣に取り組む
    22→- エビデンスに基づき憶測を言わない
    23→- **URL を絶対に捏造しない。確実に存在するURLのみ提示する。不確かな場合は「詳しくは aicu.jp または note.com/aicu をご覧ください」と案内する**
    24→- 分からないことは「申し訳ありません、もっと詳しく教えていただけますか？」と問う
    25→- 日本語で丁寧かつ簡潔に応答する
    26→- 技術的な問題やアカウント関連の詳細な対応が必要な場合は、人間のスタッフに引き継ぐ
    27→- 引き継ぎが必要と判断した場合、回答の最後に [ESCALATE] と付ける
    28→- 個人情報の取り扱いには十分注意する`
    29→
    30→export async function generateResponse(
    31→  message: string,
    32→): Promise<{ text: string; shouldEscalate: boolean }> {
    33→  try {
    34→    const model = genAI.getGenerativeModel({
    35→      model: "gemini-2.5-flash",
    36→      systemInstruction: SYSTEM_PROMPT,
    37→      tools: [{ googleSearch: {} } as never],
    38→    })
    39→    const result = await model.generateContent(message)
    40→
    41→    const responseText = result.response.text()
    42→    const shouldEscalate = responseText.includes("[ESCALATE]")
    43→    const text = responseText.replace(/\s*\[ESCALATE\]\s*/g, "").trim()
    44→
    45→    return { text, shouldEscalate }
    46→  } catch (err) {
    47→    console.error("[gemini] generation failed:", err)
    48→    return {
    49→      text: "申し訳ありません、現在応答に問題が発生しています。スタッフにおつなぎしますので、少々お待ちください。",
    50→      shouldEscalate: true,
    51→    }
    52→  }
    53→}
    54→

1→import { NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getUser } from "@/lib/auth"
     3→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     4→import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants"
     5→import { getTotalContactsCount, getTotalMembersCount } from "@/lib/wix"
     6→
     7→export async function GET() {
     8→  // Auth check
     9→  const user = await getUser()
    10→  if (!user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(user.email)) {
    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  const admin = getAdminSupabase()
    15→
    16→  // Parallel queries
    17→  const [
    18→    unifiedResult,
    19→    wixLinkedResult,
    20→    discordLinkedResult,
    21→    login7dResult,
    22→    login30dResult,
    23→    newUsers7dResult,
    24→    authUsersResult,
    25→    profilesResult,
    26→    pushSubsResult,
    27→    recentLoginsResult,
    28→  ] = await Promise.all([
    29→    // Total unified_users
    30→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }),
    31→    // Wix linked
    32→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("wix_contact_id", "is", null),
    33→    // Discord linked
    34→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("discord_id", "is", null),
    35→    // Login last 7 days
    36→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("last_login_at", new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()),
    37→    // Login last 30 days
    38→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("last_login_at", new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000).toISOString()),
    39→    // New users last 7 days
    40→    admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("created_at", new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()),
    41→    // Auth users count (via admin API)
    42→    admin.auth.admin.listUsers({ page: 1, perPage: 1 }),
    43→    // Profiles count
    44→    admin.from("profiles").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }),
    45→    // Push subscriptions (unique users)
    46→    admin.from("push_subscriptions").select("user_id", { count: "exact", head: true }),
    47→    // Recent logins (top 10)
    48→    admin.from("unified_users").select("primary_email, last_login_at, wix_contact_id, discord_id").order("last_login_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false }).limit(10),
    49→  ])
    50→
    51→  const totalUsers = unifiedResult.count ?? 0
    52→  const wixLinked = wixLinkedResult.count ?? 0
    53→  const discordLinked = discordLinkedResult.count ?? 0
    54→  const login7d = login7dResult.count ?? 0
    55→  const login30d = login30dResult.count ?? 0
    56→  const newUsers7d = newUsers7dResult.count ?? 0
    57→
    58→  // auth.users total from listUsers response
    59→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    60→  const authUsersTotal = (authUsersResult as any)?.data?.total ?? totalUsers
    61→  const profilesCount = profilesResult.count ?? 0
    62→  const pushSubsCount = pushSubsResult.count ?? 0
    63→
    64→  // Wix counts (may fail if Wix not configured)
    65→  let wixTotalContacts = 0
    66→  let wixTotalMembers = 0
    67→  try {
    68→    ;[wixTotalContacts, wixTotalMembers] = await Promise.all([
    69→      getTotalContactsCount(),
    70→      getTotalMembersCount(),
    71→    ])
    72→  } catch (e) {
    73→    console.error("[admin/stats] Wix count error:", e)
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  const safeRate = (n: number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0
    77→
    78→  return NextResponse.json({
    79→    generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    80→    users: {
    81→      total: totalUsers,
    82→      wix_linked: wixLinked,
    83→      wix_linked_rate: safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers),
    84→      discord_linked: discordLinked,
    85→      discord_linked_rate: safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers),
    86→      profile_completed: profilesCount,
    87→      profile_completed_rate: safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal),
    88→      push_subscribed: pushSubsCount,
    89→      push_subscribed_rate: safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal),
    90→    },
    91→    retention: {
    92→      login_7d: login7d,
    93→      login_30d: login30d,
    94→      wau_mau_ratio: safeRate(login7d, login30d),
    95→      new_users_7d: newUsers7d,
    96→    },
    97→    wix: {
    98→      total_members: wixTotalMembers,
    99→      total_contacts: wixTotalContacts,
   100→    },
   101→    recent_logins: recentLoginsResult.data ?? [],
   102→  })
   103→}
   104→

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { createClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js"
     3→import { notifySlackStaff } from "@/lib/slack"
     4→
     5→// Active survey IDs to report — add new campaigns here
     6→const ACTIVE_SURVEYS = ["R2602"]
     7→
     8→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
     9→  // Vercel Cron Secret 認証
    10→  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization")
    11→  const cronSecret = process.env.CRON_SECRET
    12→  if (cronSecret && authHeader !== `Bearer ${cronSecret}`) {
    13→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  try {
    17→    const supabase = createClient(
    18→      process.env.SUPABASE_URL ?? process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    19→      process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY!,
    20→    )
    21→
    22→    const since = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
    23→    const results: Record<string, { total: number; recent: number; test: number }> = {}
    24→
    25→    for (const surveyId of ACTIVE_SURVEYS) {
    26→      const [r1, r2, r3] = await Promise.all([
    27→        supabase
    28→          .from("survey_responses")
    29→          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
    30→          .eq("survey_id", surveyId)
    31→          .neq("is_test", true),
    32→        supabase
    33→          .from("survey_responses")
    34→          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
    35→          .eq("survey_id", surveyId)
    36→          .neq("is_test", true)
    37→          .gte("submitted_at", since),
    38→        supabase
    39→          .from("survey_responses")
    40→          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
    41→          .eq("survey_id", surveyId)
    42→          .eq("is_test", true),
    43→      ])
    44→
    45→      if (r1.error) throw r1.error
    46→      if (r2.error) throw r2.error
    47→
    48→      results[surveyId] = {
    49→        total: r1.count ?? 0,
    50→        recent: r2.count ?? 0,
    51→        test: r3.count ?? 0,
    52→      }
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    const now = new Date().toLocaleString("ja-JP", { timeZone: "Asia/Tokyo" })
    56→
    57→    const lines = ["📊 デイリーレポート", `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`]
    58→    for (const [sid, r] of Object.entries(results)) {
    59→      lines.push(`【${sid}】`)
    60→      lines.push(`  本番回答数: ${r.total} 件`)
    61→      lines.push(`  過去24h新規: +${r.recent} 件`)
    62→      if (r.test) lines.push(`  テスト: ${r.test} 件（除外済み）`)
    63→      lines.push(`  速報: https://p.aicu.jp/q/${sid}/results`)
    64→    }
    65→    lines.push(`━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`)
    66→    lines.push(`集計時刻: ${now}`)
    67→
    68→    await notifySlackStaff(lines.join("\n"))
    69→
    70→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, results })
    71→  } catch (error) {
    72→    console.error("[daily-report] error:", error)
    73→    await notifySlackStaff(
    74→      `❌ デイリーレポート失敗\nError: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`,
    75→    )
    76→    return NextResponse.json(
    77→      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error" },
    78→      { status: 500 },
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→}
    82→
